inputs.label: Known Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance of a recent race or time trial in kilometers

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance of a recent race or time trial in kilometers
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son yarış veya zaman denemesinin kilometre cinsinden mesafesi

inputs.label: Known Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Minutes portion of the time achieved for the known distance

businessContext_i18n.en: Minutes portion of the time achieved for the known distance
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilinen mesafe için elde edilen sürenin dakika kısmı

inputs.label: Known Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Seconds portion of the time achieved for the known distance (0-59)

businessContext_i18n.en: Seconds portion of the time achieved for the known distance (0-59)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilinen mesafe için elde edilen sürenin saniye kısmı (0-59)

inputs.label: Target Distance
inputs.businessContext: Target race distance in kilometers for which to predict the equivalent time

businessContext_i18n.en: Target race distance in kilometers for which to predict the equivalent time
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşdeğer sürenin tahmin edileceği hedef yarış mesafesi (kilometre)

inputs.label: Fatigue Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Empirical exponent for predicting equivalent race times (typically 1.06 for runners)

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical exponent for predicting equivalent race times (typically 1.06 for runners)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşdeğer yarış sürelerini tahmin etmek için ampirik üs (genellikle koşucular için 1.06)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
